meaning: n.皇后,女皇帝,皇太后,极有权力的女人
examples: He'll also meet the emperor and the empress at a lunch on Tuesday.
"How much the bird reminds me of the musical box that belonged to our blessed Empress," said an old knight.
The company received a commercial boost from the Empress Eugenie of France, when she decided the new colour flattered her.
Milford Haven Port Authority is to face new legal action over the Sea Empress disaster.
Arianna Huffington, blog empress, does not have warm feelings toward Nick Denton, blog overlord.
